## Checklist

- [ ] Change is consistent with [`docs/SPECIFICATION.md`](../docs/SPECIFICATION.md) and accepted ADRs
- [ ] Any architecture-relevant decision is captured in an ADR (status `proposed` or accepted) — or none is needed per the calibration rule in [`AGENTS.md`](../AGENTS.md)
- [ ] The ADR index in [`docs/adr/README.md`](../docs/adr/README.md) is updated if an ADR was added, superseded, or changed status
- [ ] Uses the project vocabulary consistently
- [ ] All artifacts (code, comments, docs) are in English
- [ ] Build and tests pass locally
